name: Resolute Mining Limited
description: Resolute Mining Limited is an Australian-based gold mining, development, and exploration company with a strategic focus on operations in Africa. The company owns and operates two primary gold mines: the Syama Gold Mine in Mali and the Mako Gold Mine in Senegal. With a commitment to long-life, high-margin assets, Resolute Mining leverages its expertise to drive growth and consolidation within the African gold sector. Headquartered in Perth, Western Australia, the company continues to explore and develop mineral properties, including its flagship Doropo Gold Project in Côte d’Ivoire, while maintaining a strong focus on sustainable mining practices.
